title: Ferry group
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Ferry_trn.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] ''Ferry 4'' entering [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]''' hangar.]]
[[Habeen]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s '''''Ferry''''' served aboard [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Lendova]]'' at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Transport/Legends|Transports]] ''Ferry'' carried hyperdrive and experimental technology over to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'' after a formal agreement aboard [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Shuttle]] [[Nexus (Lambda-class)|''Nexus'']].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
